title: polygonella robusta
intro: Polygonella robusta, also known as the red ringworm or robust polygonella, is a flowering plant native to the Americas and the Caribbean. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its anthelmintic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help in treating parasitic infections and reducing inflammation. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including aiding in the treatment of gastrointestinal issues, skin conditions, and respiratory problems. Polygonella robusta is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for its medicinal uses.
